text.title: Financial Planning Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding Financial Planning. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: Maintain both a 3-month detailed projection AND a 12-month directional projection. Single-horizon plans miss short-term + long-term shocks.
rule.rationale: Single-horizon plans miss either short-term cash shocks or long-term strategic shifts.

rule.statement: runway_months = cash / monthly_burn, refreshed monthly. <6 months triggers an action plan.
rule.rationale: Below 6 months without an action plan = surprise pivot or shutdown.

rule.statement: Reserve ≥20% of monthly revenue in a separate operating-buffer account before allocating to reinvestment or founder pay.
rule.rationale: Without reserve, one bad month wipes margin.

rule.statement: Declare reinvestment % vs founder pay % monthly (e.g. 40% reinvest / 40% pay / 20% reserve). Ad-hoc split = drift to short-term founder pay.
rule.rationale: Undisclosed splits drift to all-founder-pay and starve growth.

rule.statement: Monthly reconciliation: actual vs projected; adjust both horizons. Quarterly-only catches drift 2 months late.
rule.rationale: Quarterly-only review catches drift 2 months late.

rule.statement: Include tax estimate in burn from day 1. Tax 'surprise' is the #1 founder cash-flow disaster.
rule.rationale: Tax-blind plans regularly hit -30% cash shocks at year-end.

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do not run this methodology — route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above when complexity is light), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-ops-financial-planning.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
